name: widget-harness-bundle-src
description: Second isolated npm project. Builds the B1 (React-Router history) and B2 (HashRouter) standalone SPAs into ../public/b1-spa and ../public/b2-spa. Its built output is committed so `npm run dev` serves the bundles with no build dependency.

scripts.build: vite build --config vite.b1.config.ts && vite build --config vite.b2.config.ts
